entry.title: Re: 🎉 Let's celebrate! 25 Years of SAP University Alliances
entry.content:
Hi @julia_stumpe hoping you can help me with some questions I have regarding SAP University Alliances.

As a student at ORT University in Uruguay, I recently reached out to the Academic Department to inquire about the benefits of being part of the SAP University Alliances program. Unfortunately, they were unable to provide a clear answer. However, I believe it’s essential to understand the advantages of this program, especially for educational institutions like ours. 
Should the Uni provide any material for me to study? Or access to the software for hands on?
I'm not sure what is the benefit of being part of the Alliance.

Your feedback is much appreciated.

entry.title: Cannot join any group
entry.content:
Hi,

I just joined the SAP Community and have been trying to join the Beginner's corner and Welcome Group, but I keep getting error messages when trying to post or join any group like below:

Node was not found

  • The core node you are trying to access was not found, it may have been deleted. Please refresh your original page and try the operation again.

or

You do not have sufficient privileges for this resource or its parent to perform this action.

Click your browser's Back button to continue.

 

Could someone please help? It'd be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hi David,

I am Nhan from VietNam, now I'm a junior university student majoring in E-commerce. However, I have a passion for ERP and want to improve my skill in this field. When hearing about SAP Digital Initiatives Programme, I believe this is an ideal opportunity for me to enhance myself. 

I will really appreciate if you give a chance to gain the free certificate attempt because I am under a tight buget now. 

Thanks for your consideration. I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon. 

Sincerely, 

Nhan Dinh

entry.title: Re: Authoring SAP Companion Content - About Author Permis...
entry.content: @AngadJadhav Yes. The one who are not having authoring roles will not be able to edit the SAP Companion contents. They will just see the pencil icon.

entry.title: How to trace missing application privileges in XS classic
entry.content:
XS clasic application is protected by an application privilege.

.xsprivileges

{ "privileges" :

[ { "name" : "Basic", "description" : "Basic usage privilege" } ]}

 

.xsaccess

{

"exposed" : true,

"authentication" :{ "method": "Form" },

"authorization": ["<application privilege>"],

"prevent_xsrf" : false

}

If a user is granted the application privilege, its user_name is show, if this privilege is not granted an HTTP 403 is shown. All works as planned.

Question: If a user does not have the required privileges, receives an HTTP 403. How can I, as an admin, determine which application privilege is missing? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to trace missing application privileges in XS cla...
entry.content:
Hi customer,

Technically, the privilege of a user should be handled well by the developer of the object and system administrator. As user authorization administration is custom task and out of SAP Product Support scope.

For troubleshooting purpose, you can always set 'info' or 'debug' level authorization trace in the database to trace missing privilege issues.The trace can be enabled either in Administration tools like SAP HANA Studio/SAP HANA Cockpit, or run SQL commands.

Since application privilege defines the authorization level in XS Classic application, the information would be logged in either XSengine trace or Indexserver trace (when xsengine embedded).
The SQL commands would be:

  1. Enable tracing
    -- for standalone xsengine service:
    alter system alter configuration ('xsengine.ini','SYSTEM') SET ('trace','authorization')='info' with reconfigure;
    or
    -- for embedded xsengine service:
    alter system alter configuration ('indexserver.ini','SYSTEM') SET ('trace','authorization')='info' with reconfigure;

  2. reproduce the error
  3. Disable tracing immediately
    alter system alter configuration ('xsengine.ini','SYSTEM') unset ('trace','authorization') with reconfigure;
    or
    alter system alter configuration ('indexserver.ini','SYSTEM') unset ('trace','authorization') with reconfigure;

Afterwards, you can check the xsengine trace or indexserver trace by the issued timestamp and find which privilege is missing with messages like below:

User <user_name> is missing ... privileges ... <privilege name>...

 

Best regards,
Rainie
SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Which CDS view gives the Transaction Codes of Journal Entries in S4HANA
entry.content: I have to create a dashboard in SAC based on the S4HANA Fiori screens Journal Entry Analyzer and Managed Journal Entry. I am using the CDS views corresponding to the above screens to get my data however in the managed Journal Entry screen we have a field Transaction Codes which is not present in either of the CDS views. Is there a way to identify which Fiori screen related to what CDS views

entry.title: Re: How can I update one cell in column from other cell i...
entry.content: There is no 'WHERE' condition for sure, but you may model the join key (the dimension, i.e. EmpID) as property of another dimension. Then use advance formula to combine the data properly. BTW, for classic model, join different data source during data import is supported, while this feature for new model is not available yet. Again, not all columns need to be dimension in SAC, this should be considered wisely.

entry.title: Re: Approve purchase order - SAP Fiori App

From my opinion, if you set up a flow of approval and need to approve, and you will get the notification in My Inbox.

I'm not sure how it works in Private Cloud system, but in Public Cloud system, we need to create a workflow in APP Manage Workflows for Purchase Orders.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Editing standard content in the Exte...
entry.content:
That's a lot of detailed questions, and honestly you could find the answers to almost all of them in the standard documentation, and could figure out the rest from a bit of playing around. But in short:

  1. No
  2. See Question 4
  3. There's a command on the Options button
  4. See Question 2 and Answer 3
  5. No
  6. No
  7. See the Server Settings
  8. Nothing / No

If you need additional details, see my first para.

entry.title: Re: "Unsorted" Vs. "My Unsorted" Folder in SAP Enable Now...
entry.content:
1. Because you haven't selected them for synching ('Check Out Objects'). And then they just appear in Unsorted.
  2. They won't, unless the other Authors Check them Out

In general, unsorted should be empty, so get into the habit of moving content out of there.

entry.title: Re: What is the future for SAP Crystal Reports Server 2020?
entry.content:
Hi jhardwood,

Here's an excerpt from a statement of direction blog post for SAP Analytics BI  that might help you with your planning.

"We plan to release the first version of SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 in Q4 2024, followed by Support Packages every year. As per our standard maintenance policy, it will be supported until at least end of 2029 for mainstream maintenance, and 2031 for priority 1 support. To maximize the value for our customers, we will focus ongoing investments on the most-widely adopted SAP BusinessObjects BI solutions: SAP BusinessObjects Web Intelligence, single source .unx universes, SAP Crystal Reports, SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office, Lumira Designer and the SAP BusinessObjects BI platform."

entry.title: Sub-contracting MRP area not showing in MD04
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we have two material codes for which we have maintained sub-contracting MRP area in material master MRP1 view. When we checked the MRP area in MD04 screen one material is showing plant and sub-contracting MRP area but one material is only showing plant MRP area. Can you pls help what may be the root cause of this issue. Pics attached for reg.

126XX76 is the failing material & 126XX66 is successful case.

entry.title: Re: Changing Button Color on Selecting Input Control in S...
entry.content:
I would use story CSS to achieve this.

In the story CSS, create an entry similar to:

.red-button .sap-custom-button {
	background-color: red;
	color: white;
}

Then you need to apply or clear the class to the button depending on the selection state. Something like:

if (this.getInputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembers().length > 0) {
	Button_1.setCssClass('red-button');
} else {
	Button_1.setCssClass('');
}

The problem you might have is that I don't think it is possible to have no selection in an input control. The event will only fire when a selection is made. If you uncheck all members, then the application is in a wait state until a selection is made again.

entry.title: Change Key field in table
entry.content: Hi , I want to change custom table primary key. Already they are maintain WERKS,MATNR & MRP Area. I need to make VKORG as Key field in table but VKORG position also needs to correction. if i make the changes in table will it have any effect in existing data in the production server ??

entry.title: Re: Changing Button Color on Selecting Input Control in S...
entry.content:
Hello,

You need a css class like this :

.popupRed .sap-custom-popup-footer-button {
    background-color:red;
}

and a script like this on the event onSelect of your InputControl :

if (!InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().isAllMembersSelected()) {
	Popup_1.setCssClass("popupRed");
} else {
	Popup_1.setCssClass("");
}

 I hope it helps.

entry.title: Re: Changing Button Color on Selecting Input Control in S...
entry.content: Hello, yes, you can use in the if statement : if (!InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().isAllMembersSelected())

Harsha

 

Reference:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/security-considerations-for-sap-authorization-and-trust-management-service?q=login%2Fcallback%2F%2a%2a#loio88b7d9d4c6ff4498b48dbc0b7be8a294

entry.title: The Probable Loop-Hole (SE97) – Called up Transactions !
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Today, we will be discussing on an interesting SAP Security Related Topic, with its functional intervention. 

Do read the full blog...

  • In general terms, when we execute a T-code in the SAP System, it calls various T-codes by-default in the background, which might push our SAP system to various security, data breaches and also to various data leaks.

Let’s understand the scenario clearly using an example:-

For example, an End-User executes the T-code “ME51N” – Create Purchase Requisition, if now the user wants to view the Material Master Data, he can view that data, even though he is not having the access of MM03 T-code in his user id.

This thing is possible because of the “Called Transactions”. This kind of thing is not at all desirable, whenever we are dealing with certain confidential master datas, & we don’t want the End User to even have a look at it !

Whenever we execute some T-Codes, the system checks the consistency at the table “TCDCOUPLES” , this table actually provides us with a complete data mapping of the “Calling T-Code” & the “Called T-Code”.

In our example, the transaction “ME51N” is calling the transaction “MM03” .

If the Check Field is "BLANK", as show in the screenshot attached, it means the Calling T-Code can access the Called T-Code without the need of any  Authorization Checks !  

Now, if we want to restrict the Call Transactions from Calling certain data sensitive Master Data Related Transactions, then we have to simply alter the “Check ID” Field to “YES”.

After this alteration, the End User will only be able to view / display the Master Data, only when the user id will have that particular T-code executing authorization.

 

Key Takeaways from this Blog :-

You should always do the review of the critical “Called Transactions”, time to time in order to prevent certain sensitive data leaks.

 

Blog Written By:-

Er. Pratik Das

B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering,

SAP Functional Consultant,

SAP Enthusiast.

entry.title: Closing Cockpit - Org Unit parameters with program execution
entry.content:
Dear Community

in context of Financial Closing Cockpit (on S/4HANA, basic version via t-codes FCLOCO -  Execution), selection of Company Codes is not considered upon task execution for programs, e.g. „Post Depreciations“, also missing default from Task List for Posting Period (defined with t-code FCLOCOT), e.g. 01/2024, as per below/attached screenshot.

Kindly advise on what setting I/we might be missing out on.

entry.title: Re: Batch Query Duplicate records
entry.content:
Hi Kadlene,

it make no sense to join to OBTN by ItemCode (only) you don't need all batches on this point.

When you join on the OIBT you have to connect it with the IGN1 by using BaseLine,BaseEntry,Basetype and direction
e.g.
OIBT.BaseLine = IGN1.LineNum 

regards Lothar

entry.title: Extract Delta Records from SAP ECC & CRM into Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to build a data lake architecture in SAP Datasphere. The source systems will be SAP ECC 6.0 EHP 7 and SAP CRM ABAP 7.0 (EHP 1). What should be the best way to ingest data from these sources? How to extract delta records? Do we need BW Bridge or SAP DI should work?

Any help is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Custom theme import failed via theme designer
entry.content:
Hi @mstancheva15! I'm just guessing based on the error message you provided "This zip-file contains more than on theme. Upload rejected.".

This error is thrown, like it says, when the zip you import contains more than one theme.

Maybe my blog post What is a theme, anyways? can give a bit of background on the structure in the zip (knowing that the zip basically contains a theming repository). More or less, the zip contains folders ("frameworks") that contain folders ("libraries") that contain folders ("themes") that contain less files or resources ("files"), e.g.

Base # <- framework
└─baseLib # <- library
  └─ my_theme # <- theme
    ├─base.less # <- file
    └─…
UI5 # <- framework
├─sap/ui/core/themes # <- library (almost…)
│ └─my_theme # <- theme
│   ├─library.less # <- file
│   └─…
└─sap/m/themes # <- library (…)
  └─my_theme # <- theme
    ├─library.less # <- file
    └─…
UR # <- framework
├─baseLib # <- library
│ └─my_theme # <- theme
│   ├─standards.less # <- file
│   └─…
├─ls # <- library
│ └─my_theme # <- theme
│   ├─standards.less # <- file
│   └─…
└─c2 # <- library
  └─my_theme # <- theme
    ├─standards.less # <- file
    └─…

(It's a bit more complicated, the structure of each framework is defined by the sSourcePathPattern of this frameworks .theming file, see e.g. the one of the Base framework, but for the sake of this answer the above is enough.)

So: the error is saying that in your zip file there is some library of some framework that contains a folder (i.e. a theme) that is named different than the folders of all other libraries of all other frameworks in your zip file. In my example that could be

Base/baseLib/my_theme
UI5/sap/ui/core/themes/my_theme
UI5/sap/m/themes/my_theme
UI5/sap/m/themes/my_theme2 # <- whoops, this is a different theme
UR/baseLib/my_theme
UR/ls/my_theme
UR/c2/my_theme

If importing a fresh export of your theme from the theme designer doesn't solve the problem, you would have to clean your zip manually, i.e.

  • unzip your exported theme
  • look for the different theme and remove it
  • zip the cleaned-up folder
  • and import that with /UI5/THEME_TOOL.

I remember the 'look and feel" session during the kickoff of the SAP project of National Bank of Greece (I was the team leader for implementation of FI-AM module and team member for the development of authorizations in modules [FI-AM, MM, PM, etc].

Aggeliki K.

entry.title: Re: Robosapiens and SAPGUI Library in Robot Framework: At...
entry.content:
Hello @AutomationTester,

that is an interesting constellation. Please let us know what exactly caused the error.

Making a recommendation is not that easy. It depends on many factors, such as which programming languages are permitted, what expertise is available in the company, etc. On the other hand I have not looked into other OSS solutions for SAP GUI automation, so I cannot recommend any or it would be very difficult for me to do that. Hope you understand that. When I automate the SAP GUI for Windows, I primarily use PowerShell without any abstraction layer - that is my most effective way.

Best regards
Stefan

Robert

entry.title: Re: Succession used without EC, then EC implementation -...
entry.content:
Hi Cle, 

Thanks for your further questions. I would like to further explain the following two points: 

1. Since you are using MDF nomination method, the position ID should remain the same.

2. For the nomination info, we use position ID + User ID to trace it. So if the user ID keeps the same, there is no impact before and after EC implementation. 

BR,

Beibei

entry.title: Costing Variants | Standard | Plan | Actual- Usage in Production Order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a question regarding Costing Variants specifically related to product costing.

We currently utilize three distinct costing variants:
1. Costing Variant (Standard Cost) B1 for standard cost estimation, which I use for standard costing.
2. Costing Variant (Plan) B2 for plan in Production Orders.
3. Costing Variant (Actual) B3 for actual in Production Orders.

Each costing variant is paired with a different costing sheet and overhead rate:
- Costing Variant B1 is paired with Costing Sheet X1, which includes an overhead (O/H) of 10%.
- Costing Variant B2 is paired with Costing Sheet X2, with an overhead of 20%.
- Costing Variant B3 is paired with Costing Sheet X3, with an overhead of 30%.

To clarify, I am using different overhead rates for each costing sheet for transparency.

After creating a Production Order, issuing materials, confirming activities, completing Goods Receipt, and conducting Month End Closing or Event-Based Product Posting all have been done successfully.

I am trying to understand how Costing Variants B1, B2 and B3 are used in the calculations and postings of Plan, Actual, and Target Values in Production Order. If we discuss the valuation of material and activity prices, the answer can become complex and diluted.

Query1:   With the combinations of Costing Variants and Costing Sheets (B1 and X1), (B2 and X2), (B3 and X3), which overhead percentage or costing sheet should be applied to the Plan Value, Actual Value, and Target Value for overhead amount?

 
Query2: What is the use of Costing Variant for Standard Cost (B1),  use of Costing Variant for Plan (B2), use of Costing Variant for Actual (B3)?
 
Note: It is not related to Actual Costing.
 
Thanks in advance.
Best regards,
Sid
 
FIN Product Cost Planning  FIN Cost Object Controlling SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance FIN (Finance) FIN Controlling

entry.title: Generate a Development Backend System Using SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools
entry.content:
Even with a lot of modern tools today's mobile development to consume an SAP backend system in a cloud environment like SAP Mobile Services still faces many challenges. For example below:

  • The backend system is running inside an on-premise system and the OData services implemented using NetWeaver Gateway system is out of date.
  • You have a big OData services that contains many entity sets that are not needed by the mobile apps. During the app development It ends up generating a pretty big proxy client in this case that becomes a burden for the client apps.
  • The backend system is not yet ready to be consumed by the mobile apps because it may be still under development, and the services might contain critical bugs to be fixed by the backend team. The mobile and frontend team have to wait until those issues get resolved before starting the actual coding for the UX and mobile app.
  • In the early stage of the project, the business consultants and architects need to create a PoC for the mobile consumption of the backend OData services, but the service is only allowed to be accessed in a read only mode and the client can't update any of its data.

In this blog post, we'll demonstrate how to create a development backend system that the mobile team can fully control out of the existing backend OData services using the SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools to overcome the above challenges. For example, in the early phase of your mobile project, you can build a PoC of the mobile app using the development backend system without having to make modifications on any of the existing backend systems.

Suppose you have set up correctly the SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools with the mobile services landscape, and you can view the mobile destinations in Visual Studio Code environment correctly:

Please note that the OData services might contains many entity sets that are not needed by the client application:

In this case we want to include only the entity sets needed by your mobile apps to our development backend system, click the "Pune" toolbar button:

You will see the prune dialog like below:

In the prune dialog, select only the entity sets that are needed by your mobile apps:

Click "OK" button to close the dialog, and you will see an updated OData CSDL model that should only contain the entity sets you need in order to build your mobile app:

Now let's build a development backend system using the above CSDL model. In order to do that, click the "Generate Development Backend" toolbar button:

Select "Yes" to confirm the generation:

Select "Yes" to include the test data from the original backend system. Mobile Backend Tools will copy 1000 records from the original backend system to the development backend system for each entity set in the current CSDL model.

Press enter key to accept the mobile destination name for the development backend system:

And the process of generating the development backend has started:

When the generation has been complete, you will see below:

You will also notice that a new mobile destination has been created in your mobile app. Now let's take a look at the generated development backend system in mobile services. Click "purchaseorder-dev" mobile destination:

You will see the development backend system only contains the 6 entity sets we selected in the prune dialog. And in the "Diagram" view, you see a much smaller OData model in the UI:

Now let's test this backend system. Right click the mobile destination for the development backend system, and click "Run Test Query" menu item:

The test query page shows up like below:

Run some tests in the test query page against this development backend system:

You can see this newly generated OData services is working as expected.

As a summary, in this blog post we have demonstrated how to generate a development backend system from an existing backend system along with the test data using SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools. With the generated development backend system that is fully owned by the mobile frontend team, the development of the backend and mobile app can be decoupled and it's also very easy to build a PoC for a mobile project at the early stage of the project.

entry.title: FAGLB03 - Display Balances (New) Differences with FAGLL03 - Display/Change Items (New)
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In FAGLB03 - Display Balances (New) , I entered the GL Account,Company Code and fiscal year and executed. Balance is 39,000. When i click on the 10th period, the line item toal shows 1,80,000. I even checked FAGLL03 - Display/Change Items (New) , it  is showing  differences. We are in ECC 6.0

How to resolve the differences? Please suggest.

Regards

Sridhar

Hello, 

I encountered the same issue. Please report this to SAP so they can address and resolve it.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Shubham Kulkarni

entry.title: Re: FAGLB03 - Display Balances (New) Differences with FAGLL03 - Display/Change Items (New)

entry.title: T code for all customer master
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

can you please let us know the t code to access all customer master date like PAN, GST number, Contact details, date of creation, user name, TCS tag.

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Integration
entry.content:
Hi Natalie,

If you have created an SAP UI5 site it is possible that you can utlise SAP Companion with that site.  Are your users launching your UI5 apps from a Fiori Launchpad or Build Work Zone?  If they are, you can turn on SAP Companion at the Fiori Launchpad and Build Work Zone levels.  If your users are not accessing the UI5 apps from Fiori Launchpad or Build Work Zone, it may be necessary to use the 3rd party version of SAP Companion, which requires technical integration using Javascript.

Let me know some more information and we can try to work out the best way forward.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steamp...
entry.content:
Hi @egbertvenema_mybrand,

why do you want to call the system itself remotely? Isn't there a local API that you can use? I found the https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_CREDITMEMOREQUESTTP business object interface. Did you consider using this? 

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: Empty destination logistics area field in inbound del...
entry.content:
Hi Eszter,

In case you are referring to receiving without task scenario, system will always try to propose a taregt logistics area during post goods receipt, only under some special circumstance system will fail to propose a target logistics area, for example, in the advanced material flow rule of site, 'Empty Bin' is maintained for 'Put-Away Strategy', but there is no empty bin in this site currently.

In case you are referring to receiving with one-step or two-step task scenario, in corresponding logistic model, you can select 'When user requests' for field 'Logistics Area Proposal'.

Kind Regards,

Henry

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Announcing SAP’s plans for a next generation Governance, Risk, and Compliance Plat
entry.content:
Hi @Shyamprasad_Nayak, 

First of all, thank you for your kind note.

I am glad to read that you find these posts useful.

Concerning your question, I think it would be more relevant on the posts focusing on SAP Risk and Assurance Management where the colleagues will have better expertise on this solution. For instance, SAP Financial Compliance / Risk and Assurance Management covers much more than Finance.

Nevertheless, I had a look for an answer to your question and I believe the following sections of the SAP Help Portal will be helpful in understanding what is available in standard: 

  • Connectivity and Integration > Adding a System Type | SAP Help Portal => See step 6, "For non-SAP systems, use EXTERNAL"
  • Creating an Automated Procedure | Help Portal
  • Integrate | SAP Help Portal

I trust this helps

Kind regards, 

Thomas

entry.title: Re: QM10/QM11/QM12 No filter can be set after upgrade on...
entry.content: only in the QM10/11/12 reports

entry.title: Physical Count should Carried out weekly
entry.content:
For the physical count should carried out weekly, every week it should sagest the number of materials with randomly (should divided into number of materials with 54)

Is there any SAP S4/HANA standard option to define on this process please give me the configuration step many thank in advance.

entry.title: Re: Empty destination logistics area field in inbound del...
entry.content: Hi Henry, thank you for your reply, but I dont see any option in logistic model to rule the proposal...Could you share a printscreen?

entry.title: Re: SAP Financial Compliance / Risk and Assurance Management covers much more than Finance
entry.content:
Hello @neil_patrick,

Thanks a lot for this blog. 

There are enquiries from customer about SAP Risk & Assurance Management (RAM) regarding its ability to connect to NON SAP Cloud Solutions as well as NON SAP ON PREM solutions. Can you please provide some information on this?

With regards,

Shyam

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Error with Call Transaction in BDC (ABAP Program CL_BUPA_RESULT_SUB_SCREEN_ALV=CP)
entry.content:
BDC is an obsolete term, it's been renamed Batch Input a very long time ago.

Not all transactions support batch input.

You may search the forum and SAP notes before asking.

See: 1951318 - Batch input in BP transaction not supported - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Editing standard content in the Exte...
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

Dirk is correct when you says that there is no way to have some standard content displayed while other content objects are hidden, however, there is a workaround.  If you configure SAP Companion to show customer-specific content and standard content in the QA environment and modify the standard objects that you want to use, you can then configure SAP Companion in Production to only show customer-specific content.  This works because when you modify a standard content object, it acts just like one of your objects.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Fast entry TAB in Prodution order
entry.content: Dear Experts, can anyone please reply.

entry.title: Re: Classification Tab in Equipment Master
entry.content: Hi I think you can use screen sequence number 099 that will give you different tabs as per your class.

entry.title: Re: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steamp...
entry.content:
Hi Kai,

Calling the public API was with a possible move to BTP in mind. If I program everything as it should work on BTP, that move would be a lot easier. And since I found tutorials that seemed to do something like it, with a lot of the objects and steps in line with expectations, I was convinced I was on the right track. It appears I found myself in a rabbit hole which I couldn't back out of.

The local API makes much more sense, not sure why that wasn't the method that popped up. Possibly because I was searching for the wrong thing.

Thanks for the insight! I'll get back to making this process work 🙂

Kind regards,
Egbert

With regards,
Shyam

entry.title: Re: Unsupported engine Node version error in Business App...

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Messaging for SAP ERP: HowTo-Guide (Part 2 - First use case)
entry.content:
@smohan29 the error "Cloud type not selected" means that there is an error in configuring the connection. I assume you might have missed to activate the BC-sets (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP%20NetWeaver%20Add-On%20for%20Event%20enablement%201.0/e966e6c0e61443ebaa0270a4bae4b363/2c45b09315bd4d648db2894cbf572aa1.html?locale=en-US)

Kind regards,
Martin

entry.title: Re: CAP with Fiori Elements: Actions on List Report / Object Page using Annotations – Part2
entry.content:
Hii @jgonzal,

Have you found any solution for it? I also have the same question.

entry.title: Re: How do you update the PO Number field on multiple ord...
entry.content:
Hey RoniC,

Here's Imre from SAP.

We do not have a ready-made report for such purposes in standard. 

You might create your own solution.

The document numbers are distributed in the Function NUMBER_GET_NEXT, so in case you only need new numbers for each PO, then I'd suggest to check what unique identifier your current PO's have (tracking number, requisition or shopping cart number [in case of SRM]) .

Based on that unique ID you could ask the Function to provide new numbers.

BR

Imre

entry.title: Re: How to deploy multiple intents of same Fiori app to W...
entry.content: Also faced the same issue - @MikeDoyle Did you found a solution?

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Visual Inspection Process in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @sayuj_nair,

Thank you for your feedback!

Have you set up the Model Outputs correctly? The order of the model’s outputs must align with the order of the classes (see Step 6). It could be a cause of this error.

Best regards,
Jianghan

entry.title: Re: Which CDS view gives the Transaction Codes of Journal...
entry.content:
Dear shilpa1581 ,

kindly check cds I_JournalEntry could fulfil your requirements or not. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/bc3ccd578b90a856e10000000a44147b.html?locale=en-US

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: CustomerExtensionForAdditionalTabs is not Working in MyInbox Fiori App Extensions
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am doing Extension for the MyInbox fiori app and I had used the Extension point "CustomerExtensionForAdditionalTabs" to add the additional tab and when i run locally in SAP Webide (SAPUI5 1.114.0) and it is working(Showing the Additional tab) and when deploy to SAP On-Premise system and try to open in Fiori Launchpad(SAPUI5 1.114.0) and the additional tab  is not Showing  in MyInox in SAP Fiori Launchpad.

Notice : We observed that it is not calling the Extension Code also in SAP Fiori Launchpad and Is any thing is missing.

Please find the attached document in detail

entry.title: Inbound IDOC ORDCHG Sales Order Items mismatch
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am working with the IDOC interface for sales order ORDERS05. receiving the IDOC from Boomi and posting the IDOC to SAP. 

The scenario sales order item change delete and add new items. if they delete 2 items and add 2 items to the existing sales order with ORDCHG. while updating sales order items no are getting overwritten. Because of this third party is not able to track the sales order items. 

if they send items like 40,50,60 as new items but in SAP getting created like 10,20,30.. but if we create same scenario in manually in SAP, it is working fine. 

let me know any has seen similar scenarios. Thank you 

Regards,

Arsul

entry.title: Re: Empty destination logistics area field in inbound del...
entry.content: Really fine and useful setup:) THANKS, IT WORKS!
